name: design-loop-methodology
description: Phase-aware diagnostic skills that critique any design surface through five conceptual lenses (design loop, intent, constraint cascade, hierarchy budget, lifecycle). The design-loop orchestrator skill detects which lifecycle phase your design system is in (bootstrap / apply / audit / tweak / refactor) and composes the right leaf-skill chain — the same lens reads very differently per phase. Ships five canonical lens docs + 12 composable skills so the methodology travels with the plugin into any consumer project.
